instruction: Nordlicht Health asked to reconnect in two weeks. Reschedule the follow-up accordingly and keep the diff focused.

cat 01_notes/nordlicht-health.md
# Nordlicht Health

## Journal

Nordlicht Health came in through a Berlin digital health roundtable and moved forward because the nursing operations team kept pushing internally after the first discovery work delivered something concrete. The account still feels real in the pragmatic sense: they do not waste time on abstract innovation language, they want backlog reduced and staff friction removed.

The caution remains legal and procurement. They are interested,

params.message: Nordlicht Health follow-up rescheduled to 2026-12-21 (two weeks from today). Updated both the account record (acct_005.json) and the linked reminder (rem_005.json) from their original date of 2026-12-14. Both records now show next_followup and due_date as 2026-12-21.
